case_title: IN RE: PARKER MEDICAL BUILDERS, INC.

docket_entries.description: PETITION FILED BY PETITIONER PARKER MEDICAL BUILDERS, INC. AS TO RESPONDENT COBAIN ORTHODONTICS
NOTICE OF PETITION TO CONFIRM ARB AWARD AND THAT JUDGMENT BE ENTERED FILED BY PETITIONER PARKER MEDICAL BUILDERS, INC. HEARING SET FOR JAN-17-2014 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY PETITIONER PARKER MEDICAL BUILDERS, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL FILED BY PETITIONER PARKER MEDICAL BUILDERS, INC.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER PARKER MEDICAL BUILDERS, INC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND THAT JUDGMENT BE ENTERED IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: TONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-17-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER PARKER MEDICAL BUILDERS, INC. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT COBAIN ORTHODONTICS $16,337.00 PRINCIPAL, $816.85 INTEREST, $460.00 COSTS, $5,025.00 ADMINISTRATIVE FEES AND EXPENSES FOR ARBITRATION, TOTAL JUDGMENT $22,638.85, SEE SCANNED DOC
